title.en: Tea and Torah: Creating a Chinese-Jewish Learning Ritual
title.zh: 茶与妥拉:创建中犹学习仪式
title.he: תה ותורה: יצירת טקס לימוד סיני-יהודי

description.en: A practical guide to combining Chinese tea culture with Torah study — creating a meaningful personal ritual that bridges both worlds.
description.zh: 将中国茶文化与妥拉学习相结合的实用指南——创造一个连接两个世界的有意义的个人仪式。
description.he: מדריך מעשי לשילוב תרבות התה הסינית עם לימוד תורה — יצירת טקס אישי משמעותי המגשר בין שני העולמות.

keyTopics: Tea selection for different study types
targetAudience: Jewish learners interested in East Asian practices
Torah students seeking new learning frameworks

quotes.text: Turn it over and over, for everything is in it
It is not your duty to finish the work, but neither are you free to desist from it

blessings.name: Torah Study Blessing
blessings.hebrew: בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה ה' אֱלֹהֵינוּ מֶלֶךְ הָעוֹלָם, אֲשֶׁר קִדְּשָׁנוּ בְּמִצְוֹתָיו וְצִוָּנוּ לַעֲסוֹק בְּדִבְרֵי תוֹרָה
blessings.transliteration: Baruch atah Adonai, Eloheinu melech ha'olam, asher kid'shanu b'mitzvotav v'tzivanu la'asok b'divrei Torah
blessings.translation: Blessed are You, Adonai our God, Sovereign of the universe, who has sanctified us with commandments and commanded us to engage with words of Torah

author.purpose: Educational bridge-building between Chinese and Jewish traditions
